name: custom-ml-implementation
original_task: Implement Optuna-based hyperparameter tuning infrastructure to improve the LightGBM ticket price prediction model from baseline (MAE: $94.60, R²: 0.35) to target performance (MAE < $85, R² > 0.40) while addressing extreme feature dominance (artist_avg_price at 61.7% importance)

stages.name: explore
stages.purpose: Identify ML infrastructure files and current training setup

stages.name: architect
stages.purpose: Provide strategic guidance on hyperparameter tuning implementation
